samples.text: If the plant receives sunlight, then the plant grows. The plant receives sunlight. Does it follow that the plant grows?
Whenever the plant receives sunlight, the plant grows as a result. In this case the plant receives sunlight. Can we conclude that the plant grows?
If the plant gets sunshine, then the plant develops. The plant gets sunshine. Does it follow that the plant develops?
The condition for 'the plant grows' is met because the plant receives sunlight. Does it follow that the plant grows?
If the plant receives sunlight, then the plant grows. The plant receives sunlight. This topic was discussed last week. Does it follow that the plant grows?
